EmailTemplate.name: AN - Contract Document Pack Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to sign your contract with Alliance Nursing
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We are excited to welcome you to the Alliance Nursing family! This is a gentle reminders to sign your employment contract so you can start accessing thousands of shifts across Australia:
SIGN CONTRACT
In your portal, you will also find your Employment handbook, Fair Work Information Statement and the Casual Employment Information Statement. Please take a moment to read these. Once you've signed the contract, we'll book you in for Induction and after that, you're ready to get booked in for shifts!
If you have any questions or need further information, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
We can't wait to get you started!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
